allow: Bash(powershell -Command "(Get-Item DBCopyTool.exe).VersionInfo | Select-Object FileVersion, ProductVersion | Format-List")

Bash(= threshold Y%, switching to TRUNCATE mode"

SCENARIOS:
- 100% changed: TRUNCATE \(instant\) + INSERT
- 50% changed: TRUNCATE \(instant\) + INSERT
- 30% changed: Delta DELETE + INSERT \(more efficient\)
- 10% changed: Delta DELETE + INSERT \(much more efficient\)

IMPACT:
Tables with high change percentage \(>= 40%\) will use TRUNCATE:
- Deletes 60k records: 6.77s → 0.01s \(677x faster!\)
- Total time: 10.05s → 3s \(3x faster!\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh release edit v1.0.2026.19 --notes "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Changes

### Bug Fixes
- **Fix memory issues in truncate mode**: Reverted to `SqlDataAdapter.Fill\(\)` which is more memory-efficient than `DataTable.Load\(reader\)`
- **Fix memory leaks on cancel/error**: All error handlers now properly dispose `CachedData` and `ControlData`
- **Fix empty controlData leak**: Dispose control data when row count is 0 in optimized mode

### Improvements
- **Memory cleanup on cancel**: `ClearCompletedTablesMemory\(\)` now clears ALL tables, not just completed ones
- **Retry always re-fetches**: No data held in memory between retries - retry always starts fresh from Tier2
- **Refresh Tier2 connection on retry**: JIT connection is refreshed before retrying failed tables \(thanks @petrjanikac!\)
- **Better memory reporting**: Shows count of cleared completed/failed tables and total rows freed

## Download
Download `DBSyncTool-v1.0.2026.19.zip`, extract, and run `DBSyncTool.exe`. Requires .NET 9 runtime.
EOF
\)")

PowerShell(git -C C:\\DBCopyApp status --short; echo "---TAGS---"; git -C C:\\DBCopyApp tag --sort=-creatordate | Select-Object -First 5; echo "---RELEASES---"; gh release list --repo \(git -C C:\\DBCopyApp remote get-url origin\) -L 5)
